title: Office building tenant reconsiders placement of video surveillance cameras
summary: The complainant, an office building tenant, became concerned when five video surveillance cameras were installed in a shared common area (the hallway and elevator lobby) without his consent or any consultation. As he did not conduct any business with the other tenant (a large company operating a call centre), he found it disturbing—and an...
